metadata.title: Seven Wonders (Extended Version) [2017 Remaster]
metadata.album: Tango in the Night (2017 Remaster) [Deluxe Edition]
metadata.lyrics:
[00:58.13] If I live to see the seven wonders
[01:02.24] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[01:06.33] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[01:14.79] So long ago
[01:17.39] Certain place, certain time
[01:23.09] You touched my hand all the way
[01:27.66] All the way down to Emmiline
[01:31.26] But if our paths never cross
[01:36.23] Well, you know I'm sorry, but
[01:38.84] If I live to see the seven wonders
[01:42.94] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[01:46.92] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[01:53.57] The rainbow's end
[01:54.88] Never
[01:57.92] 
[02:03.00] Never
[02:05.68] 
[02:11.84] So it's hard to find
[02:14.20] Someone with that kind of intensity
[02:20.17] You touched my hand, I played it cool
[02:24.76] And you reached out your hand to me
[02:28.37] But if our paths never cross
[02:33.48] Well, you know I'm sorry, but
[02:36.03] If I live to see the seven wonders
[02:40.00] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[02:44.13] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[02:50.80] The rainbow's end
[02:55.55] 
[03:04.52] Never
[03:08.35] 
[03:13.23] Never
[03:15.76] 
[03:58.14] If I live to see the seven wonders
[04:02.24] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[04:06.31] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[04:12.96] The rainbow's end
[04:14.68] Never
[04:18.08] 
[04:39.56] So long ago
[04:42.39] It's a certain time, it's a certain place
[04:47.97] You touched my hand and you smiled
[04:52.56] All the way back you held out your hand
[04:56.68] If I hope and if I pray
[05:01.54] Ooh, it might work out someday
[05:03.82] If I live to see the seven wonders
[05:07.92] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[05:12.09] I'll never live to match the beauty again
[05:20.27] If I live to see the seven wonders (if I live to see the seven wonders)
[05:24.34] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end (I'll make a path, well)
[05:28.36] I'll never live to match the beauty again (I'll never live to see the beauty, that beauty)
[05:34.25] That same, same beauty again
[05:36.54] If I live to see the seven wonders (if I live to see that)
[05:40.60] I'll make a path to the rainbow's end
[05:44.66] I'll never live to match the beauty again (oh, if I hope and I pray)
[05:50.21] Then it might work out someday
[05:53.31]
